author: @rollerskates6532
text: Watching these videos gives me a sliver of hope for justice. Growing up on the internet, I was never taught the proper safety precautions and was introduced to it from a very young age. To things such as gaming platforms, chatting platforms, anything where communication was involved I had access to. With that, I got groomed countless times, I was conditioned to it as I got older and none of those predators got the karma they deserved, and I was stuck living with what they had done to me, and I'd be lying if I said it didn't affect how I live my life and my relationships with people. Seeing you and many others do the work of getting rid of these monsters, it gives me hope for those who could be saved from whatever harm they would cause to other kids like I was subjected to, and it makes me glad that people are willing to protect those children when the people who should be protecting them don't. Thank you, from myself and many others.

author: @somespicygrapes2022
text: I had a neighbor who would sit outside in his car, windows down and music up. He had a black ford focus with a mangled up front driver side fender. Thought he was just bored out of his mind. Imagine the surprise on my face when I saw a picture of the exact same car where authorities were claiming he was frequently doing the exact same thing near a bus stop (he has no kids) and looking for him for questioning. Then imagine the HORROR on my face when I used our local predator registry map (I recommend giving yours a look as well) and saw a big ol’ red dot RIGHT NEXT TO MY HOUSE!!! He had 3 separate counts and a big fat warrant. Happy to say the house next to me is vacant once again

text: It's genuinely terrifying to see how sheepishly he seems. It made me tremble hearing him talk about his life, empathizing with him but slowly I lose certainty of how true his words even are. I commend the people involve for being so resolved, because if I were in their shoes I'd feel so remorseful and pity this guy. They seem so human, so unimposing and sound so vulnerable. His stature and height is small compared to others. But then I realize how much more human lives he can ruin or how many he has already ruined, and I really can't tell. I can't tell if I'm looking at a sheep or a wolf in sheep's clothing.

text: Hey Ruben. I just wanted to say this is the most surreal video I have EVER seen from you. When you said you were going to Round Rock TX, I was THROWN OFF.
